summary: Docker-based reproduction confirms that GraphQL introspection query exposes complete API schema without authentication
expected_security_impact: Complete API schema exposed including all types, queries, and mutations without authentication
actual_observed_result: Introspection query returned full schema with multiple types, query definitions, and mutation definitions without requiring any session token or authentication headers
verification_method: Parse introspection response JSON, count exposed types and operations, verify response contains __schema field with complete type definitions, confirm no authentication was required
evidence_produced_by_run: Introspection response contains __schema field with complete type system definition
Multiple GraphQL types exposed including User, Role, Session, File, and custom classes
Query and Mutation types enumerate all available operations
No X-Parse-Session-Token or authentication headers required for introspection query
Response time < 500ms demonstrating ease of exploitation

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned version, and mounts that checkout into the container
